entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: An important oil crop with an atypical fruitification pattern.

entities.name: POD DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of peanut pod formation and growth, influenced by external environmental stimulation.

entities.name: DARKNESS
entities.description: An external environmental stimulation required to facilitate normal peanut pod development.

entities.name: MECHANICAL STIMULATION
entities.description: An external environmental stimulation required to facilitate normal peanut pod development.

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTOME ANALYSIS
entities.description: The study of the complete set of RNA transcripts to investigate the impacts of darkness and mechanical stimulation on pod development.

entities.name: DIFFERENTIALLY EXPRESSED GENES
entities.description: Genes identified among different treatment groups that play crucial roles in peanut pod development.

entities.name: WGCNA
entities.description: Weighted gene coexpression network analysis used to identify hub genes and key pathways.

entities.name: HUB GENES
entities.description: Key genes identified via WGCNA that are candidates for peanut pod development.

entities.name: IAA9
entities.description: A hub gene (Ahy_B07g086610) identified as a candidate for peanut pod development.

entities.name: BSK5
entities.description: A hub gene (Ahy_B03g068305) identified as a candidate for peanut pod development.

entities.name: GRF7
entities.description: A hub gene (Ahy_B10g103808) identified as a candidate for peanut pod development.

entities.name: PER17
entities.description: A hub gene (Ahy_B10g105104) identified as a candidate for peanut pod development.

entities.name: PLANT HORMONAL AND SIGNAL TRANSDUCTION PATHWAY
entities.description: A key biological pathway identified as a candidate for peanut pod development.

entities.name: LIGNIN BIOSYNTHESIS PATHWAY
entities.description: A key biological pathway identified as a candidate for peanut pod development.

entities.name: QRT-PCR
entities.description: Quantitative reverse transcription polymerase chain reaction used to validate the expression patterns of key candidate genes.
